properties.name: scim.base-path
properties.description: Base path for all SCIM 2.0 endpoints.

properties.name: scim.bulk.enabled
properties.description: Whether SCIM bulk operations are enabled.

properties.name: scim.bulk.max-operations
properties.description: Maximum number of operations in a single bulk request.

properties.name: scim.bulk.max-payload-size
properties.description: Maximum payload size in bytes for bulk requests.

properties.name: scim.filter.max-results
properties.description: Maximum number of results returned by a filtered query.

properties.name: scim.pagination.default-page-size
properties.description: Default page size when count is not specified.

properties.name: scim.etag.enabled
properties.description: Whether ETag support is enabled for optimistic concurrency.

properties.name: scim.patch.enabled
properties.description: Whether SCIM PATCH operations are enabled.

properties.name: scim.client.base-url
properties.description: Base URL of the remote SCIM service provider.

properties.name: scim.client.connect-timeout
properties.description: Connection timeout for the SCIM client.

properties.name: scim.client.read-timeout
properties.description: Read timeout for the SCIM client.
